channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts

item.title: BTC eyeing a breakout: bears linger, bulls wait for a rush above $67,793. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260404-price-prediction-btc-bitcoin-targets-70000-breakout-despite-bearish #Bitcoin #BTC #Crypto

item.title: Text-to-video is live at 0.10/second, but image-to-video and edits aren’t here yet — the editing logjam may finally crack. 🎬🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/together-ai-launches-wan-27-video-suite #AIVideo #CloudTech #Alibaba
